race.comment: Wide open two-year-old affair to kick off proceedings. ASTON (3) has had two runs to date, getting home strongly in good splits last time behind an impressive winner in Mbube. He's up and running and should be hard to hold out. PORTINARI (15) resumes having been pitched up in the G2 Blue Diamond Prelude on debut, covering ground there out wide behind subsequent G1 winner Streisand. She's since spelled and has jumped out very well, keeping safe. LUCKY BROOK (11) is a filly by Lucky Vega on debut for the Eurell yard who has won a number of jumpouts leading in and looks ready to go. FACE THE WILD (10) returns and has jumped out well in readiness. No shock to see her play a role fresh too.
